name: Undertaker / Gravedigger
description: The last professional most people ever need. Quiet, respectful, and knows the soil better than the farmers do — for different reasons.
dialogue_hooks: noting that business has been too good lately
asking if you've come about the 'disturbance' in the old section
offering funeral services with professional detachment
mentioning that a grave was found opened this morning
voice_patterns: quietly professional — death is just the job
morbid humorist — laughs at things that make others uncomfortable
religious solemnity — treats every burial as sacred
unsettling calm — too comfortable around the dead

schedule.night: watching the graveyard — someone has to
